name: Cashchubbies Islands
author: Poki
description: Take a trip to paradise in Cashchubbies Island! In this idle tycoon game, it's up to you to build and upgrade all the different parts of your island. As you unlock new buildings and items, you'll earn more money that you can gather at the cash machine. Use the money you earn to upgrade more parts of your island and build a true tropical tycoon! Be on the lookout for stars - collect them all to make your character stronger and unlock new abilities! Let's build an awesome island in the sun! How to play Cashchubbies Island? Movement: WASD or arrow keys Who created Cashchubbies Island? Cashchubbies Island was created by d954mas. Play their other games on Poki: Blocky Universe , Punch Legend Simulator and Mr Boomi ! How can I play Cashchubbies Island for free? You can play Cashchubbies Island for free on Poki. Can I play Cashchubbies Island on mobile devices and desktop? Cashchubbies Island can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
